examples: High fibre diets give the feeling of fullness.
The coat has raglan sleeves, and is cut to give fullness at the back.
Why do we indulge in the myth that the fabulous wealth generated by this mode of production will in the fullness of time become available to all people?
This discordant melody can and will be exposed only in the fullness of time.
Yet the other day you said something that in the fullness of time will make your grandchildren cringe.
